```
4600: 		"value": alignment_failures,
4601: 		"limit": max_alignment_failures,
4602: 		"ok": alignment_ok,
4603: 	})
4604: 	if not alignment_ok:
4605: 		convergence_failures += 1
4606: 
4607: 	var dashboard_ok: bool = dashboard_failures <= max_dashboard_failures
4608: 	items.append({
4609: 		"type": "dashboard_failures",
4610: 		"value": dashboard_failures,
4611: 		"limit": max_dashboard_failures,
4612: 		"severity": dashboard_severity,
4613: 		"ok": dashboard_ok,
4614: 	})
4615: 	if not dashboard_ok:
4616: 		convergence_failures += 1
4617: 
4618: 	var critical_ok: bool = critical_severity_count <= max_critical_severity_count
4619: 	items.append({
4620: 		"type": "critical_severity_count",
4621: 		"value": critical_severity_count,
4622: 		"limit": max_critical_severity_count,
4623: 		"ok": critical_ok,
4624: 	})
4625: 	if not critical_ok:
4626: 		convergence_failures += 1
4627: 
4628: 	gate_row["backend_tag"] = backend_tag
4629: 	gate_row["standardization_failures"] = standardization_failures
4630: 	gate_row["alignment_failures"] = alignment_failures
4631: 	gate_row["dashboard_failures"] = dashboard_failures
4632: 	gate_row["dashboard_severity"] = dashboard_severity
4633: 	gate_row["critical_severity_count"] = critical_severity_count
4634: 	gate_row["convergence_failures"] = convergence_failures
4635: 	gate_row["items"] = items
4636: 	report["pressure_alignment_convergence_gate"] = gate_row
4637: 
4638: 	if convergence_failures > max_convergence_failures:
4639: 		var message: String = "pressure alignment convergence failures %d exceeds %d" % [convergence_failures, max_convergence_failures]
4640: 		if run_mode == "release_blocking":
4641: 			_push_result(report, "global", "pressure_alignment_convergence_failures_exceeded", false, message)
4642: 		else:
4643: 			_push_warning(report, "global", "pressure_alignment_convergence_failures_pending", message)
4644: 
4645: 
4646: func _evaluate_regression_cycle_window_governance(
4647: 	report: Dictionary,
4648: 	cycle_cfg: Dictionary,
4649: 	run_mode: String,
4650: 	backend_tag: String
4651: ) -> void:
4652: 	if cycle_cfg.is_empty():
4653: 		return
4654: 
4655: 	var cycle_row: Dictionary = report.get("regression_cycle_window_governance", {})
4656: 	var history_file: String = str(cycle_cfg.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json"))
4657: 	var cycle_window_size: int = maxi(10, int(cycle_cfg.get("cycle_window_size", 20)))
4658: 	var min_cycle_entries: int = maxi(1, int(cycle_cfg.get("min_cycle_entries", 8)))
4659: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(cycle_cfg.get("required_run_modes", []))
4660: 	var required_backends: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(cycle_cfg.get("required_backends", []))
4661: 	var max_warning_delta: int = maxi(0, int(cycle_cfg.get("max_warning_delta", 1)))
4662: 	var max_blocker_delta: int = maxi(0, int(cycle_cfg.get("max_blocker_delta", 0)))
4663: 	var max_alignment_score_delta: float = maxf(0.0, float(cycle_cfg.get("max_alignment_score_delta", 0.2)))
4664: 	var max_cycle_failures: int = maxi(0, int(cycle_cfg.get("max_cycle_failures", 0)))
4665: 
4666: 	cycle_row["history_file"] = history_file
4667: 	cycle_row["cycle_window_size"] = cycle_window_size
4668: 	cycle_row["min_cycle_entries"] = min_cycle_entries
4669: 	cycle_row["required_run_modes"] = required_run_modes
4670: 	cycle_row["required_backends"] = required_backends
4671: 	cycle_row["max_warning_delta"] = max_warning_delta
4672: 	cycle_row["max_blocker_delta"] = max_blocker_delta
4673: 	cycle_row["max_alignment_score_delta"] = max_alignment_score_delta
4674: 	cycle_row["max_cycle_failures"] = max_cycle_failures
4675: 
4676: 	var enabled_for_mode: bool = required_run_modes.is_empty() or required_run_modes.has(run_mode)
4677: 	cycle_row["enabled_for_mode"] = enabled_for_mode
4678: 	if not enabled_for_mode:
4679: 		cycle_row["cycle_failures"] = 0
4680: 		cycle_row["items"] = [{
4681: 			"type": "run_mode_skipped",
4682: 			"value": run_mode,
4683: 			"required_run_modes": required_run_modes,
4684: 			"ok": true,
4685: 		}]
4686: 		report["regression_cycle_window_governance"] = cycle_row
4687: 		return
4688: 
4689: 	var items: Array = []
4690: 	var cycle_failures: int = 0
4691: 
4692: 	if not FileAccess.file_exists(history_file):
4693: 		cycle_failures += 1
4694: 		items.append({
4695: 			"type": "history_file_missing",
4696: 			"path": history_file,
4697: 			"ok": false,
4698: 		})
4699: 		cycle_row["window_entries"] = 0
4700: 		cycle_row["cycle_failures"] = cycle_failures
4701: 		cycle_row["items"] = items
4702: 		report["regression_cycle_window_governance"] = cycle_row
4703: 		var missing_message: String = "regression cycle history file is missing: %s" % history_file
4704: 		if run_mode == "release_blocking":
4705: 			_push_result(report, "global", "regression_cycle_window_history_missing", false, missing_message)
4706: 		else:
4707: 			_push_warning(report, "global", "regression_cycle_window_history_pending", missing_message)
4708: 		return
4709: 
4710: 	var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(FileAccess.get_file_as_string(history_file))
4711: 	if not (parsed is Array):
4712: 		cycle_failures += 1
4713: 		items.append({
4714: 			"type": "history_file_parse",
4715: 			"path": history_file,
4716: 			"ok": false,
4717: 		})
4718: 		cycle_row["window_entries"] = 0
4719: 		cycle_row["cycle_failures"] = cycle_failures
4720: 		cycle_row["items"] = items
4721: 		report["regression_cycle_window_governance"] = cycle_row
4722: 		var parse_message: String = "regression cycle history file parse failed: %s" % history_file
4723: 		if run_mode == "release_blocking":
4724: 			_push_result(report, "global", "regression_cycle_window_history_parse_failed", false, parse_message)
4725: 		else:
4726: 			_push_warning(report, "global", "regression_cycle_window_history_parse_pending", parse_message)
4727: 		return
4728: 
4729: 	var history_rows: Array = parsed
4730: 	var filtered_rows: Array = []
4731: 	for row_variant in history_rows:
4732: 		if not (row_variant is Dictionary):
4733: 			continue
4734: 		var row: Dictionary = row_variant
4735: 		var row_run_mode: String = str(row.get("run_mode", "")).strip_edges()
4736: 		var row_backend: String = str(row.get("backend_tag", "")).strip_edges()
4737: 		if not required_run_modes.is_empty() and not required_run_modes.has(row_run_mode):
4738: 			continue
4739: 		if not required_backends.is_empty() and not required_backends.has(row_backend):
4740: 			continue
4741: 		filtered_rows.append(row)
4742: 
4743: 	var window_rows: Array = []
4744: 	if filtered_rows.size() > cycle_window_size:
4745: 		window_rows = filtered_rows.slice(filtered_rows.size() - cycle_window_size, filtered_rows.size())
4746: 	else:
4747: 		window_rows = filtered_rows
4748: 
4749: 	var window_entries: int = window_rows.size()
4750: 	cycle_row["window_entries"] = window_entries
4751: 
4752: 	var entry_count_ok: bool = window_entries >= min_cycle_entries
4753: 	items.append({
4754: 		"type": "min_cycle_entries",
4755: 		"value": window_entries,
4756: 		"limit": min_cycle_entries,
4757: 		"ok": entry_count_ok,
4758: 	})
4759: 	if not entry_count_ok:
4760: 		cycle_failures += 1
4761: 
4762: 	var missing_backend_entries: Array = []
4763: 	for backend_name in required_backends:
4764: 		var backend_found: bool = false
4765: 		for row_variant in window_rows:
4766: 			if row_variant is Dictionary and str((row_variant as Dictionary).get("backend_tag", "")).strip_edges() == backend_name:
4767: 				backend_found = true
4768: 				break
4769: 		if not backend_found:
4770: 			missing_backend_entries.append(backend_name)
4771: 	items.append({
4772: 		"type": "missing_backends",
4773: 		"value": missing_backend_entries,
4774: 		"ok": missing_backend_entries.is_empty(),
4775: 	})
4776: 	if not missing_backend_entries.is_empty():
4777: 		cycle_failures += 1
4778: 
4779: 	var missing_mode_entries: Array = []
4780: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
4781: 		var mode_found: bool = false
4782: 		for row_variant in window_rows:
4783: 			if row_variant is Dictionary and str((row_variant as Dictionary).get("run_mode", "")).strip_edges() == mode_name:
4784: 				mode_found = true
4785: 				break
4786: 		if not mode_found:
4787: 			missing_mode_entries.append(mode_name)
4788: 	items.append({
4789: 		"type": "missing_run_modes",
4790: 		"value": missing_mode_entries,
4791: 		"ok": missing_mode_entries.is_empty(),
4792: 	})
4793: 	if not missing_mode_entries.is_empty():
4794: 		cycle_failures += 1
4795: 
4796: 	var warning_min: int = 0
4797: 	var warning_max: int = 0
4798: 	var blocker_min: int = 0
4799: 	var blocker_max: int = 0
4800: 	var alignment_min: float = 0.0
4801: 	var alignment_max: float = 0.0
4802: 	if window_entries > 0:
4803: 		warning_min = int((window_rows[0] as Dictionary).get("warnings", 0))
4804: 		warning_max = warning_min
4805: 		blocker_min = int((window_rows[0] as Dictionary).get("blockers", 0))
4806: 		blocker_max = blocker_min
4807: 		alignment_min = float((window_rows[0] as Dictionary).get("alignment_dashboard_score", 0.0))
4808: 		alignment_max = alignment_min
4809: 		for row_variant in window_rows:
4810: 			if not (row_variant is Dictionary):
4811: 				continue
4812: 			var row: Dictionary = row_variant
4813: 			var row_warnings: int = int(row.get("warnings", 0))
4814: 			var row_blockers: int = int(row.get("blockers", 0))
4815: 			var row_alignment_score: float = float(row.get("alignment_dashboard_score", 0.0))
4816: 			warning_min = mini(warning_min, row_warnings)
4817: 			warning_max = maxi(warning_max, row_warnings)
4818: 			blocker_min = mini(blocker_min, row_blockers)
4819: 			blocker_max = maxi(blocker_max, row_blockers)
```

```
6094: 	var markdown_file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(REPORT_MD_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
6095: 	if markdown_file:
```

```
4927: func _evaluate_cross_version_baseline(report: Dictionary, baseline: Dictionary) -> void:
4928: 	if baseline.is_empty():
4929: 		return
4930: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
4931: 	var reference_channels: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(baseline.get("reference_channels", []))
4932: 	var max_drift: Dictionary = baseline.get("max_drift", {})
4933: 	var snapshot_references: Dictionary = baseline.get("snapshot_references", {})
4934: 	var max_violations: int = int(baseline.get("max_violations", 0))
4935: 
4936: 	var cross_row: Dictionary = report.get("cross_version", {})
4937: 	var checked: int = int(cross_row.get("checked", 0))
4938: 	var violations: int = int(cross_row.get("violations", 0))
4939: 	var items: Array = cross_row.get("items", [])
4940: 
4941: 	var max_opaque_drift: float = float(max_drift.get("opaque_ratio", 1.0))
4942: 	var max_unique_drift: float = float(max_drift.get("unique_color_ratio", 1.0))
4943: 	var max_luma_drift: float = float(max_drift.get("avg_luma", 1.0))
4944: 
4945: 	for snapshot_var in snapshot_references.keys():
4946: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_var)
4947: 		var references_variant: Variant = snapshot_references.get(snapshot_var, {})
4948: 		if not (references_variant is Dictionary):
4949: 			continue
4950: 		if not snapshots.has(snapshot_id):
4951: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "cross_version_snapshot_missing", false, "snapshot missing for cross-version baseline compare")
4952: 			continue
4953: 		var references: Dictionary = references_variant
4954: 		var current_metrics_variant: Variant = snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
4955: 		if not (current_metrics_variant is Dictionary):
4956: 			continue
4957: 		var current_metrics: Dictionary = current_metrics_variant
4958: 
4959: 		for metric_key in ["opaque_ratio", "unique_colors", "avg_luma"]:
4960: 			if not references.has(metric_key):
4961: 				continue
4962: 			var metric_refs_variant: Variant = references.get(metric_key, {})
4963: 			if not (metric_refs_variant is Dictionary):
4964: 				continue
4965: 			var metric_refs: Dictionary = metric_refs_variant
4966: 			var current_value: float = float(current_metrics.get(metric_key, 0.0))
4967: 			for channel_name in reference_channels:
4968: 				if not metric_refs.has(channel_name):
4969: 					continue
4970: 				var baseline_value: float = float(metric_refs.get(channel_name, current_value))
4971: 				checked += 1
4972: 				var drift: float = 0.0
4973: 				var drift_limit: float = 1.0
4974: 				if metric_key == "unique_colors":
4975: 					drift = absf(current_value - baseline_value) / maxf(1.0, baseline_value)
4976: 					drift_limit = max_unique_drift
4977: 				elif metric_key == "opaque_ratio":
4978: 					drift = absf(current_value - baseline_value)
4979: 					drift_limit = max_opaque_drift
4980: 				else:
4981: 					drift = absf(current_value - baseline_value)
4982: 					drift_limit = max_luma_drift
4983: 
4984: 				if drift > drift_limit:
4985: 					violations += 1
4986: 					items.append({
4987: 						"snapshot": snapshot_id,
4988: 						"metric": metric_key,
4989: 						"reference_channel": channel_name,
4990: 						"current": current_value,
4991: 						"baseline": baseline_value,

4993: 						"limit": drift_limit,
4994: 					})
4995: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "cross_version_%s_%s" % [metric_key, channel_name], "cross-version drift %.3f exceeds %.3f (%s)" % [drift, drift_limit, channel_name])
4996: 
4997: 	cross_row["checked"] = checked
4998: 	cross_row["violations"] = violations
4999: 	cross_row["items"] = items
5000: 	cross_row["max_violations"] = max_violations
5001: 	report["cross_version"] = cross_row
5002: 
5003: 	if violations > max_violations:
5004: 		_push_result(report, "global", "cross_version_max_violations_exceeded", false, "cross-version violations %d exceeds %d" % [violations, max_violations])
5005: 
5006: 
5007: func _summarize_snapshot_status(report: Dictionary, snapshots: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
5008: 	var status_map: Dictionary = {}
5009: 	for snapshot_var in snapshots.keys():
5010: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_var)
5011: 		status_map[snapshot_id] = {
5012: 			"blockers": 0,
5013: 			"warnings": 0,
5014: 		}
5015: 	var items: Array = report.get("items", [])
5016: 	for item in items:
5017: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
5018: 			continue
5019: 		var row: Dictionary = item
5020: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
5021: 		if not status_map.has(snapshot_id):
5022: 			continue
5023: 		if bool(row.get("passed", false)):
5024: 			continue
5025: 		var status_row: Dictionary = status_map.get(snapshot_id, {})
5026: 		if str(row.get("severity", "blocker")) == "warning":
5027: 			status_row["warnings"] = int(status_row.get("warnings", 0)) + 1
5028: 		else:
5029: 			status_row["blockers"] = int(status_row.get("blockers", 0)) + 1
5030: 		status_map[snapshot_id] = status_row
5031: 	return status_map
5032: 
5033: 
5034: func _evaluate_report_layers(report: Dictionary, layer_defs: Dictionary, snapshots: Dictionary) -> void:
5035: 	if layer_defs.is_empty():
5036: 		return
5037: 	var status_map: Dictionary = _summarize_snapshot_status(report, snapshots)
5038: 	var layers_report: Dictionary = {}
5039: 	for layer_var in layer_defs.keys():
5040: 		var layer_name: String = str(layer_var)
5041: 		var def_variant: Variant = layer_defs.get(layer_var, {})
5042: 		if not (def_variant is Dictionary):
5043: 			continue
5044: 		var layer_def: Dictionary = def_variant
5045: 		var snapshot_ids: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(layer_def.get("snapshot_ids", []))
5046: 		if snapshot_ids.is_empty():
5047: 			continue
5048: 
5049: 		var blockers: int = 0
5050: 		var warnings: int = 0
5051: 		var passed_count: int = 0
5052: 		for snapshot_id in snapshot_ids:
5053: 			var row: Dictionary = status_map.get(snapshot_id, {"blockers": 0, "warnings": 0})
5054: 			blockers += int(row.get("blockers", 0))
5055: 			warnings += int(row.get("warnings", 0))
5056: 			if int(row.get("blockers", 0)) == 0:
5057: 				passed_count += 1
5058: 
5059: 		var total: int = snapshot_ids.size()
5060: 		var pass_ratio: float = float(passed_count) / maxf(1.0, float(total))
5061: 		layers_report[layer_name] = {
5062: 			"snapshots": total,
5063: 			"passed": passed_count,
5064: 			"pass_ratio": pass_ratio,
5065: 			"blockers": blockers,
5066: 			"warnings": warnings,
5067: 			"max_layer_blockers": int(layer_def.get("max_layer_blockers", 0)),
5068: 			"max_layer_warnings": int(layer_def.get("max_layer_warnings", 0)),
5069: 			"min_pass_ratio": float(layer_def.get("min_pass_ratio", 0.0)),
5070: 		}
5071: 
5072: 		if blockers > int(layer_def.get("max_layer_blockers", 0)):
5073: 			_push_result(report, "global", "layer_%s_blockers_exceeded" % layer_name, false, "layer %s blockers %d exceeds %d" % [layer_name, blockers, int(layer_def.get("max_layer_blockers", 0))])
5074: 		if warnings > int(layer_def.get("max_layer_warnings", 0)):
5075: 			_push_result(report, "global", "layer_%s_warnings_exceeded" % layer_name, false, "layer %s warnings %d exceeds %d" % [layer_name, warnings, int(layer_def.get("max_layer_warnings", 0))])
5076: 		if pass_ratio < float(layer_def.get("min_pass_ratio", 0.0)):
5077: 			_push_result(report, "global", "layer_%s_pass_ratio_below_min" % layer_name, false, "layer %s pass_ratio %.3f below %.3f" % [layer_name, pass_ratio, float(layer_def.get("min_pass_ratio", 0.0))])
```

```
737: func test_visual_snapshot_targets_reference_existing_scenes() -> void:
738: 	var cfg: Dictionary = _load_json_dict(VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_TARGETS_PATH)
739: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = cfg.get("snapshots", {})
740: 
741: 	for snapshot_id_var: Variant in snapshots.keys():
742: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_id_var)

744: 		var scene_path: String = str(row.get("scene", ""))
745: 		assert_true(ResourceLoader.exists(scene_path), "%s scene should exist" % snapshot_id)
746: 
747: 	var thresholds: Dictionary = cfg.get("thresholds", {})
748: 	assert_gte(int(thresholds.get("min_snapshots", 0)), 5, "D42 min_snapshots should be >= 5")
749: 	assert_eq(int(thresholds.get("max_failures", -1)), 0, "max_failures should stay strict at 0")
750: 	assert_eq(int(thresholds.get("max_trend_regressions", -1)), 0, "max_trend_regressions should stay strict at 0")
751: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_opaque_ratio_drop should be >= 0")
752: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_opaque_ratio_drop should be <= 1")
753: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)), 0.12, "D42 max_opaque_ratio_drop should be <= 0.12")
754: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be >= 0")
755: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be <= 1")
756: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)), 0.45, "D42 max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be <= 0.45")
757: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_luma_delta should be >= 0")
758: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_luma_delta should be <= 1")
759: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)), 0.15, "D42 max_luma_delta should be <= 0.15")
```

**Output:**
```
<path>D:\Desktop\Project\Game\angel-fallen\scripts\tools\run_visual_snapshot_regression.gd</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: extends SceneTree
2: 
3: const TARGETS_PATH := "res://data/balance/visual_snapshot_targets.json"
4: const PREV_REPORT_JSON_PATH := "user://visual_snapshot_previous.json"
5: const REPORT_JSON_PATH := "user://visual_snapshot_latest.json"
6: const REPORT_MD_PATH := "user://visual_snapshot_latest.md"
7: const SNAPSHOT_DIR := "user://visual_snapshots/latest"
8: 
9: 
10: func _initialize() -> void:
11: 	_rotate_previous_report()
12: 	var report: Dictionary = await _run_regression()
13: 	_write_reports(report)
14: 	var blockers: int = int(report.get("blockers", 0))
15: 	var warnings: int = int(report.get("warnings", 0))
16: 	print("Visual snapshot regression complete -> blockers: %d, warnings: %d" % [blockers, warnings])
17: 	if blockers > 0:
18: 		quit(1)
19: 	else:
20: 		quit(0)
21: 
22: 
23: func _run_regression() -> Dictionary:
24: 	var targets: Dictionary = _read_json(TARGETS_PATH)
25: 	var previous_report: Dictionary = _read_json(PREV_REPORT_JSON_PATH)
26: 	var precision: Dictionary = targets.get("precision", {})
27: 	var sample_rounds: int = maxi(1, int(precision.get("sample_rounds", 1)))
28: 	var max_opaque_ratio_stddev: float = maxf(0.0, float(precision.get("max_opaque_ratio_stddev", 1.0)))
29: 	var max_luma_stddev: float = maxf(0.0, float(precision.get("max_luma_stddev", 1.0)))
30: 	var max_unique_color_stddev_ratio: float = maxf(0.0, float(precision.get("max_unique_color_stddev_ratio", 1.0)))
31: 	var baseline_alignment: Dictionary = targets.get("baseline_alignment", {})
32: 	var required_snapshot_ids: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(baseline_alignment.get("required_snapshot_ids", []))
33: 	var allowed_capture_modes_map: Dictionary = _sanitize_allowed_capture_modes(baseline_alignment.get("allowed_capture_modes", {}))
34: 	var diff_whitelist: Dictionary = _sanitize_diff_whitelist(targets.get("diff_whitelist", {}))
35: 	var base_thresholds: Dictionary = targets.get("thresholds", {})
36: 	var base_whitelist_policy: Dictionary = targets.get("whitelist_policy", {})
37: 	var base_backend_attribution_cfg: Dictionary = targets.get("backend_attribution", {})
38: 	var base_whitelist_convergence_cfg: Dictionary = targets.get("whitelist_convergence", {})
39: 	var base_exception_lifecycle_cfg: Dictionary = targets.get("exception_lifecycle", {})
40: 	var base_report_layers: Dictionary = _sanitize_report_layers(targets.get("report_layers", {}), targets.get("snapshots", {}))
41: 	var base_cross_version_baseline: Dictionary = _sanitize_cross_version_baseline(targets.get("cross_version_baseline", {}), targets.get("snapshots", {}))
42: 	var release_gate_templates: Dictionary = _sanitize_release_gate_templates(
43: 		targets.get("release_gate_templates", {}),
44: 		targets.get("strategy_orchestration", {})
45: 	)
46: 	var backend_matrix_governance: Dictionary = _sanitize_backend_matrix_governance(targets.get("backend_matrix_governance", {}))
47: 	var base_approval_workflow: Dictionary = _sanitize_approval_workflow(targets.get("approval_workflow", {}))
48: 	var base_approval_audit_trail: Dictionary = _sanitize_approval_audit_trail(targets.get("approval_audit_trail", {}))
49: 	var base_approval_history_archive: Dictionary = _sanitize_approval_history_archive(targets.get("approval_history_archive", {}))
50: 	var approval_threshold_templates: Dictionary = _sanitize_approval_threshold_templates(
51: 		targets.get("approval_threshold_templates", {}),
52: 		release_gate_templates,
53: 		backend_matrix_governance
54: 	)
55: 	var release_candidate_tracking: Dictionary = _sanitize_release_candidate_tracking(targets.get("release_candidate_tracking", {}))
56: 	var stability_scoring: Dictionary = _sanitize_stability_scoring(targets.get("stability_scoring", {}))
57: 	var stability_tiers: Dictionary = _sanitize_stability_tiers(targets.get("stability_tiers", {}))
58: 	var convergence_dashboard: Dictionary = _sanitize_convergence_dashboard(targets.get("convergence_dashboard", {}))
59: 	var ci_signal_contract: Dictionary = _sanitize_ci_signal_contract(
60: 		targets.get("ci_signal_contract", {}),
61: 		release_gate_templates
62: 	)
63: 	var convergence_trend_reinforcement: Dictionary = _sanitize_convergence_trend_reinforcement(
64: 		targets.get("convergence_trend_reinforcement", {}),
65: 		release_candidate_tracking,
66: 		base_approval_history_archive
67: 	)
68: 	var exception_lifecycle_linkage: Dictionary = _sanitize_exception_lifecycle_linkage(
69: 		targets.get("exception_lifecycle_linkage", {}),
70: 		base_exception_lifecycle_cfg
71: 	)
72: 	var visual_performance_cogate: Dictionary = _sanitize_visual_performance_cogate(
73: 		targets.get("visual_performance_cogate", {}),
74: 		release_gate_templates
75: 	)
76: 	var cogate_threshold_templates: Dictionary = _sanitize_cogate_threshold_templates(
77: 		targets.get("cogate_threshold_templates", {}),
78: 		release_gate_templates
79: 	)
80: 	var cross_platform_alignment: Dictionary = _sanitize_cross_platform_alignment(
81: 		targets.get("cross_platform_alignment", {}),
82: 		base_approval_history_archive,
83: 		release_gate_templates
84: 	)
85: 	var pressure_scenario_standardization: Dictionary = _sanitize_pressure_scenario_standardization(
86: 		targets.get("pressure_scenario_standardization", {}),
87: 		visual_performance_cogate,
88: 		release_gate_templates
89: 	)
90: 	var alignment_dashboard_refinement: Dictionary = _sanitize_alignment_dashboard_refinement(
91: 		targets.get("alignment_dashboard_refinement", {}),
92: 		cross_platform_alignment,
93: 		release_gate_templates
94: 	)
95: 	var pressure_alignment_convergence_gate: Dictionary = _sanitize_pressure_alignment_convergence_gate(
96: 		targets.get("pressure_alignment_convergence_gate", {}),
97: 		cross_platform_alignment,
98: 		release_gate_templates
99: 	)
100: 	var regression_cycle_window_governance: Dictionary = _sanitize_regression_cycle_window_governance(
101: 		targets.get("regression_cycle_window_governance", {}),
102: 		base_approval_history_archive,
103: 		release_gate_templates,
104: 		cross_platform_alignment
105: 	)
106: 	var strategy_state: Dictionary = _resolve_strategy_orchestration(
107: 		targets.get("strategy_orchestration", {}),
108: 		{
109: 			"thresholds": base_thresholds,
110: 			"whitelist_policy": base_whitelist_policy,
111: 			"backend_attribution": base_backend_attribution_cfg,
112: 			"whitelist_convergence": base_whitelist_convergence_cfg,
113: 			"exception_lifecycle": base_exception_lifecycle_cfg,
114: 			"report_layers": base_report_layers,
115: 			"cross_version_baseline": base_cross_version_baseline,
116: 		}
117: 	)
118: 	var strategy_name: String = str(strategy_state.get("name", "default"))
119: 	var strategy_template: String = str(strategy_state.get("template", "base"))
120: 	var strategy_errors: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(strategy_state.get("errors", []))
121: 	var run_mode: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_RUN_MODE").strip_edges()
122: 	if run_mode.is_empty():
123: 		run_mode = "rehearsal"
124: 	var cogate_template_state: Dictionary = _resolve_cogate_threshold_template(
125: 		cogate_threshold_templates,
126: 		visual_performance_cogate,
127: 		run_mode
128: 	)
129: 	var resolved_visual_performance_cogate: Dictionary = cogate_template_state.get("config", visual_performance_cogate)
130: 	var cogate_template_name: String = str(cogate_template_state.get("template", ""))
131: 	var cogate_template_errors: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(cogate_template_state.get("errors", []))
132: 	var approval_template_state: Dictionary = _resolve_approval_threshold_template(
133: 		approval_threshold_templates,
134: 		run_mode,
135: 		{
136: 			"approval_workflow": base_approval_workflow,
137: 			"approval_audit_trail": base_approval_audit_trail,
138: 			"approval_history_archive": base_approval_history_archive,
139: 		}
140: 	)
141: 	var approval_template_name: String = str(approval_template_state.get("template", "standard"))
142: 	var approval_template_errors: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(approval_template_state.get("errors", []))
143: 	var approval_workflow: Dictionary = approval_template_state.get("approval_workflow", base_approval_workflow)
144: 	var approval_audit_trail: Dictionary = approval_template_state.get("approval_audit_trail", base_approval_audit_trail)
145: 	var approval_history_archive: Dictionary = approval_template_state.get("approval_history_archive", base_approval_history_archive)
146: 	var thresholds: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("thresholds", base_thresholds)
147: 	var whitelist_policy: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("whitelist_policy", base_whitelist_policy)
148: 	var backend_attribution_cfg: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("backend_attribution", base_backend_attribution_cfg)
149: 	var whitelist_convergence_cfg: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("whitelist_convergence", base_whitelist_convergence_cfg)
150: 	var exception_lifecycle_cfg: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("exception_lifecycle", base_exception_lifecycle_cfg)
151: 	var report_layers: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("report_layers", base_report_layers)
152: 	var cross_version_baseline: Dictionary = strategy_state.get("cross_version_baseline", base_cross_version_baseline)
153: 
154: 	var whitelist_max_hits: int = maxi(0, int(whitelist_policy.get("max_hits", 0)))
155: 	var whitelist_max_ratio: float = clampf(float(whitelist_policy.get("max_ratio", 0.0)), 0.0, 1.0)
156: 	var required_backends: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(backend_attribution_cfg.get("required_backends", []))
157: 	var max_unattributed_regressions: int = maxi(0, int(backend_attribution_cfg.get("max_unattributed_regressions", 0)))
158: 	var max_backend_specific_regressions: int = maxi(0, int(backend_attribution_cfg.get("max_backend_specific_regressions", 0)))
159: 	var stale_run_threshold: int = maxi(1, int(whitelist_convergence_cfg.get("stale_run_threshold", 3)))
160: 	var tighten_margin_ratio: float = clampf(float(whitelist_convergence_cfg.get("tighten_margin_ratio", 0.25)), 0.0, 1.0)
161: 	var max_suggestions: int = maxi(0, int(whitelist_convergence_cfg.get("max_suggestions", 5)))
162: 	var expire_idle_runs: int = maxi(1, int(exception_lifecycle_cfg.get("expire_idle_runs", 2)))
163: 	var auto_reclaim_hit_streak: int = maxi(1, int(exception_lifecycle_cfg.get("auto_reclaim_hit_streak", stale_run_threshold + 1)))
164: 	var max_expired_entries: int = maxi(0, int(exception_lifecycle_cfg.get("max_expired_entries", 0)))
165: 	var max_reclaim_candidates: int = maxi(0, int(exception_lifecycle_cfg.get("max_reclaim_candidates", max_suggestions)))
166: 
167: 	var backend_tag: String = _detect_backend_tag()
168: 	var backend_profiles: Dictionary = targets.get("backend_profiles", {})
169: 	var backend_profile: Dictionary = _resolve_backend_profile(backend_profiles, backend_tag)
170: 	var unique_colors_min_scale: float = clampf(float(backend_profile.get("unique_colors_min_scale", 1.0)), 0.5, 2.0)
171: 	var luma_range_padding: float = clampf(float(backend_profile.get("luma_range_padding", 0.0)), 0.0, 0.3)
172: 	var backend_max_opaque_drop: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)))
173: 	var backend_max_unique_drop: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)))
174: 	var backend_max_luma_delta: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)))
175: 
176: 	var report: Dictionary = {
177: 		"generated_at_unix": Time.get_unix_time_from_system(),
178: 		"channel": str(targets.get("channel", "unknown")),
179: 		"backend_tag": backend_tag,
180: 		"strategy": {
181: 			"name": strategy_name,
182: 			"template": strategy_template,
183: 			"errors": strategy_errors,
184: 		},
185: 		"precision": {
186: 			"sample_rounds": sample_rounds,
187: 			"max_opaque_ratio_stddev": max_opaque_ratio_stddev,
188: 			"max_luma_stddev": max_luma_stddev,
189: 			"max_unique_color_stddev_ratio": max_unique_color_stddev_ratio,
190: 		},
191: 		"blockers": 0,
192: 		"warnings": 0,
193: 		"checked": 0,
194: 		"passed": 0,
195: 		"snapshots": {},
196: 		"trend": {
197: 			"regressions": 0,
198: 			"opaque_ratio_drops": {},
199: 			"unique_color_drop_ratios": {},
200: 			"luma_deltas": {},
201: 		},
202: 		"whitelist": {
203: 			"hits": 0,
204: 			"max_hits": whitelist_max_hits,
205: 			"ratio": 0.0,
206: 			"max_ratio": whitelist_max_ratio,
207: 			"stale_run_threshold": stale_run_threshold,
208: 			"tighten_margin_ratio": tighten_margin_ratio,
209: 			"expire_idle_runs": expire_idle_runs,
210: 			"auto_reclaim_hit_streak": auto_reclaim_hit_streak,
211: 			"max_expired_entries": max_expired_entries,
212: 			"max_reclaim_candidates": max_reclaim_candidates,
213: 			"streaks": {},
214: 			"lifecycle": {},
215: 			"convergence_suggestions": [],
216: 			"expired_entries": [],
217: 			"reclaim_candidates": [],
218: 			"items": [],
219: 		},
220: 		"backend_attribution": {
221: 			"backend_tag": backend_tag,
222: 			"required_backends": required_backends,
223: 			"regressions": 0,
224: 			"backend_specific_regressions": 0,
225: 			"max_backend_specific_regressions": max_backend_specific_regressions,
226: 			"unattributed_regressions": 0,
227: 			"max_unattributed_regressions": max_unattributed_regressions,
228: 			"items": [],
229: 		},
230: 		"cross_version": {
231: 			"checked": 0,
232: 			"violations": 0,
233: 			"max_violations": int(cross_version_baseline.get("max_violations", 0)),
234: 			"items": [],
235: 		},
236: 		"layers": {},
237: 		"release_manifest": {
238: 			"run_mode": run_mode,
239: 			"strategy": strategy_name,
240: 			"template": strategy_template,
241: 			"required_strategies": release_gate_templates.get("required_strategies", []),
242: 			"required_strategy_bindings": release_gate_templates.get("required_strategy_bindings", {}),
243: 			"ci_mode_bindings": release_gate_templates.get("ci_mode_bindings", {}),
244: 			"max_checklist_failures": int(release_gate_templates.get("max_checklist_failures", 0)),
245: 			"checklist_failures": 0,
246: 			"errors": [],
247: 			"checklist_items": [],
248: 		},
249: 		"backend_matrix": {
250: 			"backend_tag": backend_tag,
251: 			"required_backend_matrix": backend_matrix_governance.get("required_backend_matrix", []),
252: 			"declared_backend_matrix": _parse_csv_env(OS.get_environment("VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX")),
253: 			"required_run_modes": backend_matrix_governance.get("required_run_modes", []),
254: 			"missing_backend_matrix": [],
255: 			"missing_run_mode_bindings": [],
256: 			"max_missing_backend_matrix": int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_backend_matrix", 0)),
257: 			"max_missing_run_mode_bindings": int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_run_mode_bindings", 0)),
258: 		},
259: 		"approval": {
260: 			"required_report_sections": approval_workflow.get("required_report_sections", []),
261: 			"require_zero_blockers": bool(approval_workflow.get("require_zero_blockers", true)),
262: 			"require_zero_warnings_for_strategies": approval_workflow.get("require_zero_warnings_for_strategies", []),
263: 			"max_approval_failures": int(approval_workflow.get("max_approval_failures", 0)),
264: 			"approval_failures": 0,
265: 			"checklist_items": [],
266: 		},
267: 		"approval_audit": {
268: 			"history_file": str(approval_audit_trail.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_history.json")),
269: 			"max_entries": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_entries", 80)),
270: 			"required_run_modes": approval_audit_trail.get("required_run_modes", []),
271: 			"required_backends": approval_audit_trail.get("required_backends", []),
272: 			"require_unique_pipeline_id": bool(approval_audit_trail.get("require_unique_pipeline_id", true)),
273: 			"max_missing_pipeline_id": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_missing_pipeline_id", 0)),
274: 			"max_history_trace_failures": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_history_trace_failures", 0)),
275: 			"pipeline_id": "",
276: 			"history_entries": 0,
277: 			"missing_run_modes": [],
278: 			"missing_backends": [],
279: 			"duplicate_pipeline_ids": [],
280: 			"trace_failures": 0,
281: 			"missing_pipeline_id_count": 0,
282: 			"items": [],
283: 		},
284: 		"approval_archive": {
285: 			"archive_file": str(approval_history_archive.get("archive_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
286: 			"max_entries": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_entries", 240)),
287: 			"aggregation_window": int(approval_history_archive.get("aggregation_window", 80)),
288: 			"required_backends": approval_history_archive.get("required_backends", []),
289: 			"required_run_modes": approval_history_archive.get("required_run_modes", []),
290: 			"max_missing_archive_backends": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_missing_archive_backends", 0)),
291: 			"max_missing_archive_run_modes": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_missing_archive_run_modes", 0)),
292: 			"max_backend_warning_delta": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_backend_warning_delta", 0)),
293: 			"max_backend_blocker_delta": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_backend_blocker_delta", 0)),
294: 			"max_archive_trace_failures": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_archive_trace_failures", 0)),
295: 			"history_entries": 0,
296: 			"window_entries": 0,
297: 			"missing_backends": [],
298: 			"missing_run_modes": [],
299: 			"backend_warning_delta": 0,
300: 			"backend_blocker_delta": 0,
301: 			"trace_failures": 0,
302: 			"items": [],
303: 		},
304: 		"approval_template": {
305: 			"run_mode": run_mode,
306: 			"template": approval_template_name,
307: 			"errors": approval_template_errors,
308: 		},
309: 		"release_candidate_tracking": {
310: 			"history_file": str(release_candidate_tracking.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
311: 			"window": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("window", 40)),
312: 			"required_run_modes": release_candidate_tracking.get("required_run_modes", []),
313: 			"required_strategies": release_candidate_tracking.get("required_strategies", []),
314: 			"min_runs": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("min_runs", 1)),
315: 			"max_avg_warnings": float(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_avg_warnings", 1.0)),
316: 			"max_total_blockers": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_total_blockers", 0)),
317: 			"max_tracking_failures": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_tracking_failures", 0)),
318: 			"matching_runs": 0,
319: 			"avg_warnings": 0.0,
320: 			"total_blockers": 0,
321: 			"tracking_failures": 0,
322: 			"items": [],
323: 		},
324: 		"stability_scoring": {
325: 			"score": 0.0,
326: 			"tier": str(stability_tiers.get("default_tier", "D")),
327: 			"confidence": 0.0,
328: 			"min_confidence": float((stability_scoring.get("confidence", {}) as Dictionary).get("min_confidence", 0.4)),
329: 			"scoring_failures": 0,
330: 			"items": [],
331: 		},
332: 		"convergence_dashboard": {
333: 			"dashboard_failures": 0,
334: 			"max_dashboard_failures": int(convergence_dashboard.get("max_dashboard_failures", 0)),
335: 			"items": [],
336: 		},
337: 		"ci_signal": {
338: 			"required_fields": ci_signal_contract.get("required_fields", []),
339: 			"tier_requirements": ci_signal_contract.get("tier_requirements", {}),
340: 			"max_contract_failures": int(ci_signal_contract.get("max_contract_failures", 0)),
341: 			"contract_failures": 0,
342: 			"items": [],
343: 		},
344: 		"convergence_trend": {
345: 			"trend_failures": 0,
346: 			"max_trend_failures": int(convergence_trend_reinforcement.get("max_trend_failures", 0)),
347: 			"items": [],
348: 		},
349: 		"exception_lifecycle_linkage": {
350: 			"linkage_failures": 0,
351: 			"max_linkage_failures": int(exception_lifecycle_linkage.get("max_linkage_failures", 0)),
352: 			"items": [],
353: 		},
354: 		"visual_performance_cogate": {
355: 			"required_run_modes": resolved_visual_performance_cogate.get("required_run_modes", []),
356: 			"max_cogate_failures": int(resolved_visual_performance_cogate.get("max_cogate_failures", 0)),
357: 			"cogate_failures": 0,
358: 			"items": [],
359: 		},
360: 		"cogate_template": {
361: 			"run_mode": run_mode,
362: 			"template": cogate_template_name,
363: 			"errors": cogate_template_errors,
364: 		},
365: 		"cross_platform_alignment": {
366: 			"history_file": str(cross_platform_alignment.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
367: 			"aggregation_window": int(cross_platform_alignment.get("aggregation_window", 80)),
368: 			"required_run_modes": cross_platform_alignment.get("required_run_modes", []),
369: 			"required_backends": cross_platform_alignment.get("required_backends", []),
370: 			"max_missing_backends": int(cross_platform_alignment.get("max_missing_backends", 0)),
371: 			"max_missing_run_modes": int(cross_platform_alignment.get("max_missing_run_modes", 0)),
372: 			"max_alignment_failures": int(cross_platform_alignment.get("max_alignment_failures", 0)),
373: 			"alignment_failures": 0,
374: 			"items": [],
375: 		},
376: 		"pressure_scenario_standardization": {
377: 			"required_run_modes": pressure_scenario_standardization.get("required_run_modes", []),
378: 			"required_scenarios": pressure_scenario_standardization.get("required_scenarios", []),
379: 			"max_standardization_failures": int(pressure_scenario_standardization.get("max_standardization_failures", 0)),
380: 			"standardization_failures": 0,
381: 			"items": [],
382: 		},
383: 		"alignment_dashboard_refinement": {
384: 			"required_run_modes": alignment_dashboard_refinement.get("required_run_modes", []),
385: 			"max_dashboard_failures": int(alignment_dashboard_refinement.get("max_dashboard_failures", 0)),
386: 			"dashboard_failures": 0,
387: 			"items": [],
388: 		},
389: 		"pressure_alignment_convergence_gate": {
390: 			"required_run_modes": pressure_alignment_convergence_gate.get("required_run_modes", []),
391: 			"required_backends": pressure_alignment_convergence_gate.get("required_backends", []),
392: 			"max_convergence_failures": int(pressure_alignment_convergence_gate.get("max_convergence_failures", 0)),
393: 			"convergence_failures": 0,
394: 			"items": [],
395: 		},
396: 		"regression_cycle_window_governance": {
397: 			"required_run_modes": regression_cycle_window_governance.get("required_run_modes", []),
398: 			"required_backends": regression_cycle_window_governance.get("required_backends", []),
399: 			"cycle_window_size": int(regression_cycle_window_governance.get("cycle_window_size", 20)),
400: 			"min_cycle_entries": int(regression_cycle_window_governance.get("min_cycle_entries", 8)),
401: 			"max_cycle_failures": int(regression_cycle_window_governance.get("max_cycle_failures", 0)),
402: 			"cycle_failures": 0,
403: 			"items": [],
404: 		},
405: 		"items": [],
406: 	}
407: 
408: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = targets.get("snapshots", {})
409: 	if snapshots.is_empty():
410: 		_push_result(report, "global", "missing_snapshots", false, "visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots is empty")
411: 		return report
412: 
413: 	for strategy_error in strategy_errors:
414: 		_push_result(report, "global", "strategy_orchestration_invalid", false, strategy_error)
415: 	for approval_error in approval_template_errors:
416: 		_push_result(report, "global", "approval_threshold_template_invalid", false, approval_error)
417: 	for cogate_error in cogate_template_errors:
418: 		_push_result(report, "global", "cogate_threshold_template_invalid", false, cogate_error)
419: 
420: 	for required_id in required_snapshot_ids:
421: 		if not snapshots.has(required_id):
422: 			_push_result(report, "global", "required_snapshot_missing", false, "required snapshot '%s' not found in targets" % required_id)
423: 
424: 	var min_snapshots: int = int(thresholds.get("min_snapshots", 1))
425: 	var max_failures: int = int(thresholds.get("max_failures", 0))
426: 	var max_trend_regressions: int = int(thresholds.get("max_trend_regressions", 0))
427: 	var max_opaque_ratio_drop: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)), backend_max_opaque_drop)
428: 	var max_unique_color_drop_ratio: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)), backend_max_unique_drop)
429: 	var max_luma_delta: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)), backend_max_luma_delta)
430: 
431: 	DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(SNAPSHOT_DIR)
432: 	var allowed_capture_modes: Array[String] = _resolve_allowed_capture_modes(allowed_capture_modes_map, backend_tag)
433: 
434: 	var passed_snapshots: int = 0
435: 	for snapshot_id_var in snapshots.keys():
436: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_id_var)
437: 		var row_variant: Variant = snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
438: 		if not (row_variant is Dictionary):
439: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "invalid_snapshot_row", false, "snapshot row must be object")
440: 			continue
441: 
442: 		var row: Dictionary = row_variant
443: 		var capture_result: Dictionary = await _capture_snapshot(snapshot_id, row, sample_rounds)
444: 		if not bool(capture_result.get("ok", false)):
445: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "capture_failed", false, str(capture_result.get("message", "capture failed")))
446: 			continue
447: 
448: 		var metrics: Dictionary = capture_result.get("metrics", {})
449: 		var snapshot_metrics: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
450: 		snapshot_metrics[snapshot_id] = metrics
451: 		report["snapshots"] = snapshot_metrics
452: 
453: 		var opaque_ratio: float = float(metrics.get("opaque_ratio", 0.0))
454: 		var unique_colors: int = int(metrics.get("unique_colors", 0))
455: 		var avg_luma: float = float(metrics.get("avg_luma", 0.0))
456: 		var capture_mode: String = str(metrics.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
457: 
458: 		var opaque_ratio_min: float = float(row.get("opaque_ratio_min", 0.0))
459: 		var unique_colors_min: int = int(ceil(float(row.get("unique_colors_min", 0)) * unique_colors_min_scale))
460: 		var luma_min: float = clampf(float(row.get("luma_min", 0.0)) - luma_range_padding, 0.0, 1.0)
461: 		var luma_max: float = clampf(float(row.get("luma_max", 1.0)) + luma_range_padding, 0.0, 1.0)
462: 
463: 		var snapshot_passed: bool = true
464: 		if opaque_ratio < opaque_ratio_min:
465: 			snapshot_passed = false
466: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_min", false, "opaque_ratio %.3f below min %.3f" % [opaque_ratio, opaque_ratio_min])
467: 		if unique_colors < unique_colors_min:
468: 			snapshot_passed = false
469: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "unique_colors_min", false, "unique_colors %d below min %d" % [unique_colors, unique_colors_min])
470: 		if avg_luma < luma_min or avg_luma > luma_max:
471: 			snapshot_passed = false
472: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "luma_range", false, "avg_luma %.3f out of range [%.3f, %.3f]" % [avg_luma, luma_min, luma_max])
473: 		if not allowed_capture_modes.is_empty() and not allowed_capture_modes.has(capture_mode):
474: 			snapshot_passed = false
475: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "capture_mode_not_allowed", false, "capture_mode %s not allowed for backend %s" % [capture_mode, backend_tag])
476: 
477: 		var opaque_ratio_stddev: float = float(metrics.get("opaque_ratio_stddev", 0.0))
478: 		var luma_stddev: float = float(metrics.get("avg_luma_stddev", 0.0))
479: 		var unique_stddev_ratio: float = float(metrics.get("unique_color_stddev_ratio", 0.0))
480: 		if opaque_ratio_stddev > max_opaque_ratio_stddev:
481: 			snapshot_passed = false
482: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_stddev", false, "opaque_ratio_stddev %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [opaque_ratio_stddev, max_opaque_ratio_stddev])
483: 		if luma_stddev > max_luma_stddev:
484: 			snapshot_passed = false
485: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "luma_stddev", false, "avg_luma_stddev %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [luma_stddev, max_luma_stddev])
486: 		if unique_stddev_ratio > max_unique_color_stddev_ratio:
487: 			snapshot_passed = false
488: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_stddev_ratio", false, "unique_color_stddev_ratio %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [unique_stddev_ratio, max_unique_color_stddev_ratio])
489: 
490: 		var previous_snapshots: Dictionary = previous_report.get("snapshots", {})
491: 		var previous_metrics: Dictionary = previous_snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
492: 		if not previous_metrics.is_empty():
493: 			var prev_opaque_ratio: float = float(previous_metrics.get("opaque_ratio", opaque_ratio))
494: 			var prev_unique_colors: float = float(previous_metrics.get("unique_colors", unique_colors))
495: 			var prev_luma: float = float(previous_metrics.get("avg_luma", avg_luma))
496: 
497: 			var opaque_drop: float = maxf(0.0, prev_opaque_ratio - opaque_ratio)
498: 			var unique_drop_ratio: float = 0.0
499: 			if prev_unique_colors > 0.0:
500: 				unique_drop_ratio = maxf(0.0, (prev_unique_colors - float(unique_colors)) / prev_unique_colors)
501: 			var luma_delta: float = absf(prev_luma - avg_luma)
502: 			var whitelist_row: Dictionary = _resolve_snapshot_whitelist(diff_whitelist, backend_tag, snapshot_id)
503: 			var whitelist_reason: String = str(whitelist_row.get("reason", ""))
504: 			var effective_opaque_drop: float = max_opaque_ratio_drop
505: 			var effective_unique_drop: float = max_unique_color_drop_ratio
506: 			var effective_luma_delta: float = max_luma_delta
507: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_opaque_ratio_drop"):
508: 				effective_opaque_drop = maxf(effective_opaque_drop, float(whitelist_row.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", effective_opaque_drop)))
509: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_unique_color_drop_ratio"):
510: 				effective_unique_drop = maxf(effective_unique_drop, float(whitelist_row.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", effective_unique_drop)))
511: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_luma_delta"):
512: 				effective_luma_delta = maxf(effective_luma_delta, float(whitelist_row.get("max_luma_delta", effective_luma_delta)))
513: 
514: 			var trend: Dictionary = report.get("trend", {})
515: 			var opaque_ratio_drops: Dictionary = trend.get("opaque_ratio_drops", {})
516: 			opaque_ratio_drops[snapshot_id] = opaque_drop
517: 			trend["opaque_ratio_drops"] = opaque_ratio_drops
518: 			var unique_color_drop_ratios: Dictionary = trend.get("unique_color_drop_ratios", {})
519: 			unique_color_drop_ratios[snapshot_id] = unique_drop_ratio
520: 			trend["unique_color_drop_ratios"] = unique_color_drop_ratios
521: 			var luma_deltas: Dictionary = trend.get("luma_deltas", {})
522: 			luma_deltas[snapshot_id] = luma_delta
523: 			trend["luma_deltas"] = luma_deltas
524: 			report["trend"] = trend
525: 
526: 			if opaque_drop > max_opaque_ratio_drop:
527: 				if opaque_drop <= effective_opaque_drop:
528: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_drop", opaque_drop, max_opaque_ratio_drop, effective_opaque_drop, whitelist_reason)
529: 				else:
530: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_drop", "opaque_ratio drop %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [opaque_drop, effective_opaque_drop])
531: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
532: 					report["trend"] = trend
533: 			if unique_drop_ratio > max_unique_color_drop_ratio:
534: 				if unique_drop_ratio <= effective_unique_drop:
535: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_drop_ratio", unique_drop_ratio, max_unique_color_drop_ratio, effective_unique_drop, whitelist_reason)
536: 				else:
537: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_drop_ratio", "unique_colors drop ratio %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [unique_drop_ratio, effective_unique_drop])
538: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
539: 					report["trend"] = trend
540: 			if luma_delta > max_luma_delta:
541: 				if luma_delta <= effective_luma_delta:
542: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "luma_delta", luma_delta, max_luma_delta, effective_luma_delta, whitelist_reason)
543: 				else:
544: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "luma_delta", "luma delta %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [luma_delta, effective_luma_delta])
545: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
546: 					report["trend"] = trend
547: 
548: 		if snapshot_passed:
549: 			passed_snapshots += 1
550: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "snapshot_metrics", true, "snapshot metrics within baseline")
551: 
552: 	if passed_snapshots < min_snapshots:
553: 		_push_result(report, "global", "min_snapshots", false, "passed snapshots %d below min_snapshots %d" % [passed_snapshots, min_snapshots])
554: 
555: 	for required_id in required_snapshot_ids:
556: 		var captured_snapshots: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
557: 		if not captured_snapshots.has(required_id):
558: 			_push_result(report, "global", "required_snapshot_not_captured", false, "required snapshot '%s' missing from report" % required_id)
559: 
560: 	var trend_row: Dictionary = report.get("trend", {})
561: 	var trend_regressions: int = int(trend_row.get("regressions", 0))
562: 	if trend_regressions > max_trend_regressions:
563: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_trend_regressions_exceeded", false, "trend regressions %d exceeds %d" % [trend_regressions, max_trend_regressions])
564: 
565: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
566: 	var whitelist_hits: int = int(whitelist_row.get("hits", 0))
567: 	var whitelist_ratio: float = 0.0
568: 	if snapshots.size() > 0:
569: 		whitelist_ratio = float(whitelist_hits) / float(snapshots.size())
570: 	whitelist_row["ratio"] = whitelist_ratio
571: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
572: 	if whitelist_hits > whitelist_max_hits:
573: 		_push_result(report, "global", "whitelist_max_hits_exceeded", false, "whitelist hits %d exceeds %d" % [whitelist_hits, whitelist_max_hits])
574: 	if whitelist_ratio > whitelist_max_ratio:
575: 		_push_result(report, "global", "whitelist_max_ratio_exceeded", false, "whitelist ratio %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [whitelist_ratio, whitelist_max_ratio])
576: 
577: 	_evaluate_backend_attribution(report, backend_tag, required_backends, max_unattributed_regressions, max_backend_specific_regressions)
578: 	_evaluate_whitelist_convergence(report, previous_report, stale_run_threshold, tighten_margin_ratio, max_suggestions)
579: 	_evaluate_exception_lifecycle(report, previous_report, expire_idle_runs, auto_reclaim_hit_streak, max_expired_entries, max_reclaim_candidates)
580: 
581: 	_evaluate_cross_version_baseline(report, cross_version_baseline)
582: 	_evaluate_report_layers(report, report_layers, snapshots)
583: 	_evaluate_release_gate_templates(
584: 		report,
585: 		release_gate_templates,
586: 		targets.get("strategy_orchestration", {}),
587: 		strategy_name,
588: 		strategy_template,
589: 		run_mode
590: 	)
591: 	_evaluate_backend_matrix_governance(report, backend_matrix_governance, release_gate_templates, run_mode)
592: 	_evaluate_approval_workflow(report, approval_workflow, strategy_name)
593: 	_evaluate_approval_audit_trail(report, approval_audit_trail, strategy_name, run_mode, backend_tag)
594: 	_evaluate_approval_history_archive(report, approval_history_archive, strategy_name, run_mode, backend_tag)
595: 	_evaluate_release_candidate_tracking(report, release_candidate_tracking, run_mode)
596: 	_evaluate_stability_scoring(report, stability_scoring, stability_tiers, run_mode)
597: 	_evaluate_convergence_dashboard(report, convergence_dashboard, run_mode)
598: 	_evaluate_ci_signal_contract(report, ci_signal_contract, stability_tiers, run_mode)
599: 	_evaluate_convergence_trend_reinforcement(report, convergence_trend_reinforcement, run_mode)
600: 	_evaluate_exception_lifecycle_linkage(report, exception_lifecycle_linkage, run_mode)
601: 	_evaluate_cogate_threshold_template(report, cogate_template_errors, run_mode)
602: 	_evaluate_visual_performance_cogate(report, resolved_visual_performance_cogate, run_mode)
603: 	_evaluate_cross_platform_alignment(report, cross_platform_alignment, run_mode, backend_tag)
604: 	_evaluate_pressure_scenario_standardization(report, pressure_scenario_standardization, run_mode)
605: 	_evaluate_alignment_dashboard_refinement(report, alignment_dashboard_refinement, run_mode)
606: 	_evaluate_pressure_alignment_convergence_gate(report, pressure_alignment_convergence_gate, run_mode, backend_tag)
607: 	_evaluate_regression_cycle_window_governance(report, regression_cycle_window_governance, run_mode, backend_tag)
608: 
609: 	var failures: int = int(report.get("blockers", 0))
610: 	if failures > max_failures:
611: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_failures_exceeded", false, "blockers %d exceeds max_failures %d" % [failures, max_failures])
612: 
613: 	return report
614: 
615: 
616: func _register_whitelist_hit(
617: 	report: Dictionary,
618: 	snapshot_id: String,
619: 	rule_id: String,
620: 	actual: float,
621: 	default_limit: float,
622: 	effective_limit: float,
623: 	reason: String
624: ) -> void:
625: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
626: 	var items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
627: 	items.append(
628: 		{
629: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
630: 			"id": rule_id,
631: 			"actual": actual,
632: 			"default_limit": default_limit,
633: 			"effective_limit": effective_limit,
634: 			"reason": reason,
635: 		}
636: 	)
637: 	whitelist_row["items"] = items
638: 	whitelist_row["hits"] = int(whitelist_row.get("hits", 0)) + 1
639: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
640: 	var message: String = "%s %.3f exceeds default %.3f but allowed by whitelist %.3f" % [rule_id, actual, default_limit, effective_limit]
641: 	if not reason.is_empty():
642: 		message += " (%s)" % reason
643: 	_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "%s_whitelisted" % rule_id, message)
644: 
645: 
646: func _evaluate_backend_attribution(
647: 	report: Dictionary,
648: 	backend_tag: String,
649: 	required_backends: Array[String],
650: 	max_unattributed_regressions: int,
651: 	max_backend_specific_regressions: int
652: ) -> void:
653: 	var attribution_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_attribution", {})
654: 	var snapshot_metrics: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
655: 	var items: Array = report.get("items", [])
656: 
657: 	var regressions: int = 0
658: 	var backend_specific_regressions: int = 0
659: 	var unattributed_regressions: int = 0
660: 	var attribution_items: Array = []
661: 
662: 	for item in items:
663: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
664: 			continue
665: 		var row: Dictionary = item
666: 		if bool(row.get("passed", false)):
667: 			continue
668: 		if str(row.get("severity", "blocker")) != "warning":
669: 			continue
670: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
671: 		if rule_id != "opaque_ratio_drop" and rule_id != "unique_color_drop_ratio" and rule_id != "luma_delta":
672: 			continue
673: 
674: 		regressions += 1
675: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
676: 		var capture_mode: String = "unknown"
677: 		if snapshot_metrics.has(snapshot_id):
678: 			var metric_row: Variant = snapshot_metrics.get(snapshot_id, {})
679: 			if metric_row is Dictionary:
680: 				capture_mode = str(metric_row.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
681: 
682: 		var attribution: String = "unattributed"
683: 		if capture_mode.begins_with("fallback_"):
684: 			attribution = backend_tag
685: 			backend_specific_regressions += 1
686: 		else:
687: 			unattributed_regressions += 1
688: 
689: 		attribution_items.append({
690: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
691: 			"id": rule_id,
692: 			"capture_mode": capture_mode,
693: 			"attribution": attribution,
694: 		})
695: 
696: 	attribution_row["backend_tag"] = backend_tag
697: 	attribution_row["required_backends"] = required_backends
698: 	attribution_row["regressions"] = regressions
699: 	attribution_row["backend_specific_regressions"] = backend_specific_regressions
700: 	attribution_row["max_backend_specific_regressions"] = max_backend_specific_regressions
701: 	attribution_row["unattributed_regressions"] = unattributed_regressions
702: 	attribution_row["max_unattributed_regressions"] = max_unattributed_regressions
703: 	attribution_row["items"] = attribution_items
704: 	report["backend_attribution"] = attribution_row
705: 
706: 	if not required_backends.is_empty() and not required_backends.has(backend_tag):
707: 		_push_result(report, "global", "backend_not_allowed", false, "backend %s is not listed in backend_attribution.required_backends" % backend_tag)
708: 
709: 	if unattributed_regressions > max_unattributed_regressions:
710: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_unattributed_regressions_exceeded", false, "unattributed regressions %d exceeds %d" % [unattributed_regressions, max_unattributed_regressions])
711: 
712: 	if backend_specific_regressions > max_backend_specific_regressions:
713: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_backend_specific_regressions_exceeded", false, "%s regressions %d exceeds %d" % [backend_tag, backend_specific_regressions, max_backend_specific_regressions])
714: 
715: 
716: func _evaluate_whitelist_convergence(
717: 	report: Dictionary,
718: 	previous_report: Dictionary,
719: 	stale_run_threshold: int,
720: 	tighten_margin_ratio: float,
721: 	max_suggestions: int
722: ) -> void:
723: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
724: 	var whitelist_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
725: 	var previous_whitelist: Dictionary = previous_report.get("whitelist", {})
726: 	var previous_streaks: Dictionary = previous_whitelist.get("streaks", {})
727: 
728: 	var streaks: Dictionary = {}
729: 	var suggestions: Array = []
730: 
731: 	for item in whitelist_items:
732: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
733: 			continue
734: 		var row: Dictionary = item
735: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
736: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
737: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
738: 			continue
739: 
740: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
741: 		var previous_streak: int = int(previous_streaks.get(key, 0))
742: 		var current_streak: int = previous_streak + 1
743: 		streaks[key] = current_streak
744: 
745: 		if current_streak < stale_run_threshold:
746: 			continue
747: 		if max_suggestions > 0 and suggestions.size() >= max_suggestions:
748: 			continue
749: 
750: 		var default_limit: float = float(row.get("default_limit", 0.0))
751: 		var effective_limit: float = float(row.get("effective_limit", default_limit))
752: 		if effective_limit <= default_limit:
753: 			continue
754: 
755: 		var suggested_limit: float = default_limit + (effective_limit - default_limit) * (1.0 - tighten_margin_ratio)
756: 		suggested_limit = clampf(suggested_limit, default_limit, effective_limit)
757: 		if suggested_limit >= effective_limit:
758: 			continue
759: 
760: 		suggestions.append({
761: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
762: 			"id": rule_id,
763: 			"reason": str(row.get("reason", "")),
764: 			"streak": current_streak,
765: 			"actual": float(row.get("actual", 0.0)),
766: 			"default_limit": default_limit,
767: 			"current_limit": effective_limit,
768: 			"suggested_limit": suggested_limit,
769: 		})
770: 
771: 	whitelist_row["streaks"] = streaks
772: 	whitelist_row["convergence_suggestions"] = suggestions
773: 	whitelist_row["stale_run_threshold"] = stale_run_threshold
774: 	whitelist_row["tighten_margin_ratio"] = tighten_margin_ratio
775: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
776: 
777: 
778: func _evaluate_exception_lifecycle(
779: 	report: Dictionary,
780: 	previous_report: Dictionary,
781: 	expire_idle_runs: int,
782: 	auto_reclaim_hit_streak: int,
783: 	max_expired_entries: int,
784: 	max_reclaim_candidates: int
785: ) -> void:
786: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
787: 	var current_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
788: 	var convergence_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("convergence_suggestions", [])
789: 	var previous_whitelist: Dictionary = previous_report.get("whitelist", {})
790: 	var previous_lifecycle: Dictionary = previous_whitelist.get("lifecycle", {})
791: 
792: 	var current_items_by_key: Dictionary = {}
793: 	for item in current_items:
794: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
795: 			continue
796: 		var row: Dictionary = item
797: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
798: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
799: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
800: 			continue
801: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
802: 		current_items_by_key[key] = row
803: 
804: 	var suggestions_by_key: Dictionary = {}
805: 	for item in convergence_items:
806: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
807: 			continue
808: 		var row: Dictionary = item
809: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
810: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
811: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
812: 			continue
813: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
814: 		suggestions_by_key[key] = row
815: 
816: 	var all_keys: Dictionary = {}
817: 	for key_var in previous_lifecycle.keys():
818: 		all_keys[str(key_var)] = true
819: 	for key_var in current_items_by_key.keys():
820: 		all_keys[str(key_var)] = true
821: 
822: 	var lifecycle: Dictionary = {}
823: 	var expired_entries: Array = []
824: 	var reclaim_candidates: Array = []
825: 
826: 	for key_var in all_keys.keys():
827: 		var key: String = str(key_var)
828: 		var previous_row_variant: Variant = previous_lifecycle.get(key, {})
829: 		var previous_row: Dictionary = previous_row_variant if previous_row_variant is Dictionary else {}
830: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(previous_row.get("snapshot", ""))
831: 		var rule_id: String = str(previous_row.get("id", ""))
832: 		var hit_streak: int = int(previous_row.get("hit_streak", 0))
833: 		var idle_runs: int = int(previous_row.get("idle_runs", 0))
834: 		var total_hits: int = int(previous_row.get("total_hits", 0))
835: 		var last_status: String = "idle"
836: 
837: 		if current_items_by_key.has(key):
838: 			var current_row_variant: Variant = current_items_by_key.get(key, {})
839: 			var current_row: Dictionary = current_row_variant if current_row_variant is Dictionary else {}
840: 			snapshot_id = str(current_row.get("snapshot", snapshot_id))
841: 			rule_id = str(current_row.get("id", rule_id))
842: 			hit_streak += 1
843: 			idle_runs = 0
844: 			total_hits += 1
845: 			last_status = "hit"
846: 		else:
847: 			hit_streak = 0
848: 			idle_runs += 1
849: 			last_status = "idle"
850: 
851: 		var lifecycle_row: Dictionary = {
852: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
853: 			"id": rule_id,
854: 			"hit_streak": hit_streak,
855: 			"idle_runs": idle_runs,
856: 			"total_hits": total_hits,
857: 			"last_status": last_status,
858: 		}
859: 		lifecycle[key] = lifecycle_row
860: 
861: 		if total_hits > 0 and idle_runs >= expire_idle_runs:
862: 			expired_entries.append({
863: 				"key": key,
864: 				"snapshot": snapshot_id,
865: 				"id": rule_id,
866: 				"idle_runs": idle_runs,
867: 				"expire_idle_runs": expire_idle_runs,
868: 			})
869: 
870: 		if hit_streak >= auto_reclaim_hit_streak:
871: 			var candidate: Dictionary = {
872: 				"key": key,
873: 				"snapshot": snapshot_id,
874: 				"id": rule_id,
875: 				"hit_streak": hit_streak,
876: 				"auto_reclaim_hit_streak": auto_reclaim_hit_streak,
877: 			}
878: 			if suggestions_by_key.has(key):
879: 				var suggestion_variant: Variant = suggestions_by_key.get(key, {})
880: 				if suggestion_variant is Dictionary:
881: 					var suggestion: Dictionary = suggestion_variant
882: 					candidate["suggested_limit"] = float(suggestion.get("suggested_limit", 0.0))
883: 					candidate["current_limit"] = float(suggestion.get("current_limit", 0.0))
884: 					candidate["reason"] = str(suggestion.get("reason", ""))
885: 			reclaim_candidates.append(candidate)
886: 
887: 	whitelist_row["expire_idle_runs"] = expire_idle_runs
888: 	whitelist_row["auto_reclaim_hit_streak"] = auto_reclaim_hit_streak
889: 	whitelist_row["max_expired_entries"] = max_expired_entries
890: 	whitelist_row["max_reclaim_candidates"] = max_reclaim_candidates
891: 	whitelist_row["lifecycle"] = lifecycle
892: 	whitelist_row["expired_entries"] = expired_entries
893: 	whitelist_row["reclaim_candidates"] = reclaim_candidates
894: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
895: 
896: 	if expired_entries.size() > max_expired_entries:
897: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_expired_entries_exceeded", false, "expired whitelist entries %d exceeds %d" % [expired_entries.size(), max_expired_entries])
898: 	if reclaim_candidates.size() > max_reclaim_candidates:
899: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_reclaim_candidates_exceeded", false, "reclaim candidates %d exceeds %d" % [reclaim_candidates.size(), max_reclaim_candidates])
900: 
901: 
902: func _capture_snapshot(snapshot_id: String, row: Dictionary, sample_rounds: int) -> Dictionary:
903: 	var scene_path: String = str(row.get("scene", ""))
904: 	if scene_path.is_empty() or not scene_path.begins_with("res://"):
905: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "invalid scene path"}
906: 	if not ResourceLoader.exists(scene_path):
907: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene does not exist"}
908: 
909: 	var packed_scene: PackedScene = load(scene_path) as PackedScene
910: 	if packed_scene == null:
911: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene load failed"}
912: 
913: 	var instance: Node = packed_scene.instantiate()
914: 	if instance == null:
915: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene instantiate failed"}
916: 
917: 	var width: int = maxi(320, int(row.get("width", 1280)))
918: 	var height: int = maxi(180, int(row.get("height", 720)))
919: 	var warmup_frames: int = maxi(1, int(row.get("warmup_frames", 12)))
920: 	var capture_frames: int = maxi(1, int(row.get("capture_frames", 4)))
921: 	var setup: String = str(row.get("setup", "none"))
922: 
923: 	var viewport: SubViewport = SubViewport.new()
924: 	viewport.disable_3d = true
925: 	viewport.transparent_bg = false
926: 	viewport.render_target_update_mode = SubViewport.UPDATE_ALWAYS
927: 	viewport.render_target_clear_mode = SubViewport.CLEAR_MODE_ALWAYS
928: 	viewport.size = Vector2i(width, height)
929: 	get_root().add_child(viewport)
930: 	viewport.add_child(instance)
931: 
932: 	await _wait_frames(warmup_frames)
933: 	_apply_snapshot_setup(instance, setup)
934: 	await _wait_frames(capture_frames)
935: 	var output_path: String = "%s/%s.png" % [SNAPSHOT_DIR, _sanitize_snapshot_id(snapshot_id)]
936: 	var rounds: Array[Dictionary] = []
937: 	var rounds_count: int = maxi(1, sample_rounds)
938: 	for round_idx in range(rounds_count):
939: 		RenderingServer.force_draw()
940: 		await _wait_frames(1)
941: 		rounds.append(_capture_single_metrics(viewport, instance, width, height, output_path))
942: 
943: 	var metrics: Dictionary = _aggregate_round_metrics(rounds)
944: 	viewport.queue_free()
945: 	await _wait_frames(1)
946: 	return {
947: 		"ok": true,
948: 		"metrics": metrics,
949: 	}
950: 
951: 
952: func _capture_single_metrics(viewport: SubViewport, instance: Node, width: int, height: int, output_path: String) -> Dictionary:
953: 	if DisplayServer.get_name() == "headless":
954: 		var fallback_metrics_headless: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
955: 		fallback_metrics_headless["image_path"] = ""
956: 		fallback_metrics_headless["capture_mode"] = "fallback_headless_display"
957: 		return fallback_metrics_headless
958: 
959: 	var texture: Texture2D = viewport.get_texture()
960: 	if texture == null:
961: 		var fallback_metrics: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
962: 		fallback_metrics["image_path"] = ""
963: 		fallback_metrics["capture_mode"] = "fallback_headless"
964: 		return fallback_metrics
965: 
966: 	var image: Image = texture.get_image()
967: 	if image == null or image.is_empty():
968: 		var fallback_metrics_empty: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
969: 		fallback_metrics_empty["image_path"] = ""
970: 		fallback_metrics_empty["capture_mode"] = "fallback_empty_image"
971: 		return fallback_metrics_empty
972: 
973: 	image.convert(Image.FORMAT_RGBA8)
974: 	var metrics: Dictionary = _compute_image_metrics(image)
975: 	var save_error: int = image.save_png(output_path)
976: 	if save_error != OK:
977: 		var fallback_metrics_save: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
978: 		fallback_metrics_save["image_path"] = ""
979: 		fallback_metrics_save["capture_mode"] = "fallback_save_error"
980: 		return fallback_metrics_save
981: 
982: 	metrics["image_path"] = output_path
983: 	metrics["capture_mode"] = "image"
984: 	return metrics
985: 
986: 
987: func _aggregate_round_metrics(rounds: Array[Dictionary]) -> Dictionary:
988: 	var round_count: int = rounds.size()
989: 	if round_count <= 0:
990: 		return {}
991: 
992: 	var opaque_values: Array[float] = []
993: 	var luma_values: Array[float] = []
994: 	var color_values: Array[float] = []
995: 	var modes: Dictionary = {}
996: 	var sampled_pixels_sum: float = 0.0
997: 	var width: int = int(rounds[0].get("width", 0))
998: 	var height: int = int(rounds[0].get("height", 0))
999: 	var image_path: String = ""
1000: 
1001: 	for row in rounds:
1002: 		var opaque_ratio: float = float(row.get("opaque_ratio", 0.0))
1003: 		var avg_luma: float = float(row.get("avg_luma", 0.0))
1004: 		var unique_colors: float = float(row.get("unique_colors", 0))
1005: 		var sampled_pixels: float = float(row.get("sampled_pixels", 0))
1006: 		opaque_values.append(opaque_ratio)
1007: 		luma_values.append(avg_luma)
1008: 		color_values.append(unique_colors)
1009: 		sampled_pixels_sum += sampled_pixels
1010: 
1011: 		var mode: String = str(row.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
1012: 		modes[mode] = int(modes.get(mode, 0)) + 1
1013: 
1014: 		if image_path.is_empty():
1015: 			var image_candidate: String = str(row.get("image_path", ""))
1016: 			if not image_candidate.is_empty():
1017: 				image_path = image_candidate
1018: 
1019: 	var opaque_avg: float = _avg(opaque_values)
1020: 	var luma_avg: float = _avg(luma_values)
1021: 	var unique_avg: float = _avg(color_values)
1022: 	var opaque_stddev: float = _stddev(opaque_values, opaque_avg)
1023: 	var luma_stddev: float = _stddev(luma_values, luma_avg)
1024: 	var unique_stddev: float = _stddev(color_values, unique_avg)
1025: 	var unique_stddev_ratio: float = unique_stddev / maxf(1.0, unique_avg)
1026: 	var sampled_pixels_avg: int = int(round(sampled_pixels_sum / float(round_count)))
1027: 	var opaque_pixels_avg: int = int(round(float(sampled_pixels_avg) * opaque_avg))
1028: 
1029: 	return {
1030: 		"width": width,
1031: 		"height": height,
1032: 		"sample_rounds": round_count,
1033: 		"sampled_pixels": sampled_pixels_avg,
1034: 		"opaque_pixels": opaque_pixels_avg,
1035: 		"opaque_ratio": opaque_avg,
1036: 		"opaque_ratio_stddev": opaque_stddev,
1037: 		"unique_colors": int(round(unique_avg)),
1038: 		"unique_colors_stddev": unique_stddev,
1039: 		"unique_color_stddev_ratio": unique_stddev_ratio,
1040: 		"avg_luma": luma_avg,
1041: 		"avg_luma_stddev": luma_stddev,
1042: 		"capture_mode": _pick_dominant_mode(modes),
1043: 		"capture_modes": modes,
1044: 		"image_path": image_path,
1045: 	}
1046: 
1047: 
1048: func _avg(values: Array[float]) -> float:
1049: 	if values.is_empty():
1050: 		return 0.0
1051: 	var total: float = 0.0
1052: 	for v in values:
1053: 		total += v
1054: 	return total / float(values.size())
1055: 
1056: 
1057: func _stddev(values: Array[float], mean: float) -> float:
1058: 	if values.size() <= 1:
1059: 		return 0.0
1060: 	var sum_sq: float = 0.0
1061: 	for v in values:
1062: 		var delta: float = v - mean
1063: 		sum_sq += delta * delta
1064: 	return sqrt(sum_sq / float(values.size()))
1065: 
1066: 
1067: func _pick_dominant_mode(modes: Dictionary) -> String:
1068: 	var best_mode: String = "unknown"
1069: 	var best_count: int = -1
1070: 	for mode_var in modes.keys():
1071: 		var mode: String = str(mode_var)
1072: 		var count: int = int(modes.get(mode, 0))
1073: 		if count > best_count:
1074: 			best_mode = mode
1075: 			best_count = count
1076: 	return best_mode
1077: 
1078: 
1079: func _detect_backend_tag() -> String:
1080: 	var env_tag: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG").strip_edges()
1081: 	if not env_tag.is_empty():
1082: 		return env_tag
1083: 	var os_name: String = OS.get_name().to_lower()
1084: 	var display_name: String = DisplayServer.get_name().to_lower()
1085: 	if display_name == "headless":
1086: 		if os_name.contains("windows"):
1087: 			return "windows_headless"
1088: 		if os_name.contains("linux"):
1089: 			return "linux_headless"
1090: 		return "default"
1091: 	return "default"
1092: 
1093: 
1094: func _resolve_backend_profile(backend_profiles: Dictionary, backend_tag: String) -> Dictionary:
1095: 	if backend_profiles.has(backend_tag):
1096: 		var row: Variant = backend_profiles.get(backend_tag)
1097: 		if row is Dictionary:
1098: 			return row
```

```
28: def _is_number(value: Any) -> bool:
29:     return isinstance(value, (int, float)) and not isinstance(value, bool)
30: 
31: 
32: def _to_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
33:     if _is_number(value):

38: def _is_hex_color(value: Any) -> bool:
39:     if not isinstance(value, str):

42:         return False
43:     if not value.startswith("#"):
44:         return False
45:     try:
46:         int(value[1:], 16)
47:         return True

56: def _validate_required_files(parsed: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:

63: def _validate_xp_curve(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
```
