1682: def _validate_visual_snapshot_targets(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
1683:     channel = data.get("channel")
1684:     snapshots = data.get("snapshots")
1685:     precision = data.get("precision")
1686:     backend_profiles = data.get("backend_profiles")
1687:     thresholds = data.get("thresholds")
1688:     baseline_alignment = data.get("baseline_alignment")
1689:     diff_whitelist = data.get("diff_whitelist")
1690:     whitelist_policy = data.get("whitelist_policy")
1691:     backend_attribution = data.get("backend_attribution")
1692:     whitelist_convergence = data.get("whitelist_convergence")
1693:     exception_lifecycle = data.get("exception_lifecycle")
1694:     strategy_orchestration = data.get("strategy_orchestration")
1695:     release_gate_templates = data.get("release_gate_templates")
1696:     backend_matrix_governance = data.get("backend_matrix_governance")
1697:     approval_workflow = data.get("approval_workflow")
1698:     approval_audit_trail = data.get("approval_audit_trail")
1699:     approval_history_archive = data.get("approval_history_archive")
1700:     approval_threshold_templates = data.get("approval_threshold_templates")
1701:     release_candidate_tracking = data.get("release_candidate_tracking")
1702:     stability_scoring = data.get("stability_scoring")
1703:     stability_tiers = data.get("stability_tiers")
1704:     convergence_dashboard = data.get("convergence_dashboard")
1705:     ci_signal_contract = data.get("ci_signal_contract")
1706:     convergence_trend_reinforcement = data.get("convergence_trend_reinforcement")
1707:     exception_lifecycle_linkage = data.get("exception_lifecycle_linkage")
1708:     visual_performance_cogate = data.get("visual_performance_cogate")
1709:     cogate_threshold_templates = data.get("cogate_threshold_templates")
1710:     cross_platform_alignment = data.get("cross_platform_alignment")
1711:     pressure_scenario_standardization = data.get("pressure_scenario_standardization")
1712:     alignment_dashboard_refinement = data.get("alignment_dashboard_refinement")
1713:     pressure_alignment_convergence_gate = data.get("pressure_alignment_convergence_gate")
1714:     regression_cycle_window_governance = data.get("regression_cycle_window_governance")
1715:     report_layers = data.get("report_layers")
1716:     cross_version_baseline = data.get("cross_version_baseline")
1717: 
1718:     if not isinstance(channel, str) or not channel.strip():
1719:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json channel must be non-empty string")
1720:     elif channel != "chapter_snapshot_v18":
1721:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json channel must be chapter_snapshot_v18")
1722: 
1723:     if not isinstance(snapshots, dict) or not snapshots:
1724:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots must be a non-empty object")
1725:         return
1726: 
1727:     for snapshot_id, row in snapshots.items():
1728:         if not isinstance(snapshot_id, str) or not snapshot_id.strip():
1729:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots key must be non-empty string")
1730:             continue
1731:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
1732:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id} must be object")
1733:             continue
1734: 
1735:         scene = row.get("scene")
1736:         setup = row.get("setup")
1737:         width = row.get("width")
1738:         height = row.get("height")
1739:         warmup_frames = row.get("warmup_frames")
1740:         capture_frames = row.get("capture_frames")
1741:         opaque_ratio_min = _to_float(row.get("opaque_ratio_min"))
1742:         unique_colors_min = row.get("unique_colors_min")
1743:         luma_min = _to_float(row.get("luma_min"))
1744:         luma_max = _to_float(row.get("luma_max"))
1745: 
1746:         if not isinstance(scene, str) or not scene.startswith("res://"):
1747:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.scene must be res:// path")
1748:         if not isinstance(setup, str) or not setup:
1749:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.setup must be non-empty string")
1750:         if not isinstance(width, int) or width < 320:
1751:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.width must be int >= 320")
1752:         if not isinstance(height, int) or height < 180:
1753:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.height must be int >= 180")
1754:         if not isinstance(warmup_frames, int) or warmup_frames < 1:
1755:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.warmup_frames must be int >= 1")
1756:         if not isinstance(capture_frames, int) or capture_frames < 1:
1757:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.capture_frames must be int >= 1")
1758:         if opaque_ratio_min is None or opaque_ratio_min < 0.0 or opaque_ratio_min > 1.0:
1759:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.opaque_ratio_min must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1760:         if not isinstance(unique_colors_min, int) or unique_colors_min < 1:
1761:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.unique_colors_min must be int >= 1")
1762:         if luma_min is None or luma_min < 0.0 or luma_min > 1.0:
1763:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.luma_min must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1764:         if luma_max is None or luma_max < 0.0 or luma_max > 1.0:
1765:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.luma_max must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1766:         if luma_min is not None and luma_max is not None and luma_min > luma_max:
1767:             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots.{snapshot_id}.luma_min cannot exceed luma_max")
1768: 
1769:     if not isinstance(precision, dict) or not precision:
1770:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json precision must be non-empty object")
1771:     else:
1772:         sample_rounds = precision.get("sample_rounds")
1773:         max_opaque_ratio_stddev = _to_float(precision.get("max_opaque_ratio_stddev"))
1774:         max_luma_stddev = _to_float(precision.get("max_luma_stddev"))
1775:         max_unique_color_stddev_ratio = _to_float(precision.get("max_unique_color_stddev_ratio"))
1776: 
1777:         if not isinstance(sample_rounds, int) or sample_rounds < 1 or sample_rounds > 8:
1778:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json precision.sample_rounds must be int within [1, 8]")
1779:         if max_opaque_ratio_stddev is None or max_opaque_ratio_stddev < 0.0 or max_opaque_ratio_stddev > 0.5:
1780:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json precision.max_opaque_ratio_stddev must be within [0.0, 0.5]")
1781:         if max_luma_stddev is None or max_luma_stddev < 0.0 or max_luma_stddev > 0.5:
1782:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json precision.max_luma_stddev must be within [0.0, 0.5]")
1783:         if max_unique_color_stddev_ratio is None or max_unique_color_stddev_ratio < 0.0 or max_unique_color_stddev_ratio > 1.0:
1784:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json precision.max_unique_color_stddev_ratio must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1785: 
1786:     if not isinstance(backend_profiles, dict) or not backend_profiles:
1787:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles must be non-empty object")
1788:     else:
1789:         if "default" not in backend_profiles:
1790:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles must include 'default'")
1791:         for required_profile in ("linux_headless", "windows_headless"):
1792:             if required_profile not in backend_profiles:
1793:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles must include '{required_profile}'")
1794:         for profile_name, row in backend_profiles.items():
1795:             if not isinstance(profile_name, str) or not profile_name.strip():
1796:                 _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles key must be non-empty string")
1797:                 continue
1798:             if not isinstance(row, dict) or not row:
1799:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name} must be non-empty object")
1800:                 continue
1801:             max_opaque_drop = _to_float(row.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop"))
1802:             max_unique_drop = _to_float(row.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio"))
1803:             max_luma_delta_profile = _to_float(row.get("max_luma_delta"))
1804:             unique_scale = _to_float(row.get("unique_colors_min_scale"))
1805:             luma_padding = _to_float(row.get("luma_range_padding"))
1806: 
1807:             if max_opaque_drop is None or max_opaque_drop < 0.0 or max_opaque_drop > 1.0:
1808:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name}.max_opaque_ratio_drop must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1809:             if max_unique_drop is None or max_unique_drop < 0.0 or max_unique_drop > 1.0:
1810:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name}.max_unique_color_drop_ratio must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1811:             if max_luma_delta_profile is None or max_luma_delta_profile < 0.0 or max_luma_delta_profile > 1.0:
1812:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name}.max_luma_delta must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1813:             if unique_scale is None or unique_scale < 0.5 or unique_scale > 2.0:
1814:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name}.unique_colors_min_scale must be within [0.5, 2.0]")
1815:             if luma_padding is None or luma_padding < 0.0 or luma_padding > 0.3:
1816:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_profiles.{profile_name}.luma_range_padding must be within [0.0, 0.3]")
1817: 
1818:     if not isinstance(baseline_alignment, dict) or not baseline_alignment:
1819:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment must be non-empty object")
1820:     else:
1821:         required_snapshot_ids = baseline_alignment.get("required_snapshot_ids")
1822:         allowed_capture_modes = baseline_alignment.get("allowed_capture_modes")
1823:         if not isinstance(required_snapshot_ids, list) or not required_snapshot_ids:
1824:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.required_snapshot_ids must be non-empty array")
1825:         else:
1826:             for idx, snapshot_id in enumerate(required_snapshot_ids):
1827:                 if not isinstance(snapshot_id, str) or not snapshot_id.strip():
1828:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.required_snapshot_ids[{idx}] must be non-empty string")
1829:                 elif isinstance(snapshots, dict) and snapshot_id not in snapshots:
1830:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.required_snapshot_ids[{idx}] must reference snapshots key")
1831: 
1832:         if not isinstance(allowed_capture_modes, dict) or not allowed_capture_modes:
1833:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.allowed_capture_modes must be non-empty object")
1834:         else:
1835:             for required_profile in ("default", "linux_headless", "windows_headless"):
1836:                 if required_profile not in allowed_capture_modes:
1837:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.allowed_capture_modes must include '{required_profile}'")
1838:             for backend_name, modes in allowed_capture_modes.items():
1839:                 if not isinstance(backend_name, str) or not backend_name.strip():
1840:                     _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.allowed_capture_modes key must be non-empty string")
1841:                     continue
1842:                 if not isinstance(modes, list) or not modes:
1843:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.allowed_capture_modes.{backend_name} must be non-empty array")
1844:                     continue
1845:                 for idx, mode in enumerate(modes):
1846:                     if not isinstance(mode, str) or not mode.strip():
1847:                         _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json baseline_alignment.allowed_capture_modes.{backend_name}[{idx}] must be non-empty string")
1848: 
1849:     if diff_whitelist is not None:
1850:         if not isinstance(diff_whitelist, dict):
1851:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist must be object when provided")
1852:         else:
1853:             for backend_name, backend_rows in diff_whitelist.items():
1854:                 if not isinstance(backend_name, str) or not backend_name.strip():
1855:                     _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist key must be non-empty string")
1856:                     continue
1857:                 if not isinstance(backend_rows, dict):
1858:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name} must be object")
1859:                     continue
1860:                 for snapshot_id, row in backend_rows.items():
1861:                     if not isinstance(snapshot_id, str) or not snapshot_id.strip():
1862:                         _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name} snapshot key must be non-empty string")
1863:                         continue
1864:                     if isinstance(snapshots, dict) and snapshot_id not in snapshots:
1865:                         _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name}.{snapshot_id} must reference snapshots key")
1866:                     if not isinstance(row, dict) or not row:
1867:                         _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name}.{snapshot_id} must be non-empty object")
1868:                         continue
1869:                     if "reason" in row and (not isinstance(row.get("reason"), str) or not str(row.get("reason", "")).strip()):
1870:                         _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name}.{snapshot_id}.reason must be non-empty string")
1871:                     for numeric_key in ("max_opaque_ratio_drop", "max_unique_color_drop_ratio", "max_luma_delta"):
1872:                         if numeric_key not in row:
1873:                             continue
1874:                         value = _to_float(row.get(numeric_key))
1875:                         if value is None or value < 0.0 or value > 1.0:
1876:                             _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json diff_whitelist.{backend_name}.{snapshot_id}.{numeric_key} must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1877: 
1878:     if not isinstance(whitelist_policy, dict) or not whitelist_policy:
1879:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_policy must be non-empty object")
1880:     else:
1881:         max_hits = whitelist_policy.get("max_hits")
1882:         max_ratio = _to_float(whitelist_policy.get("max_ratio"))
1883:         if not isinstance(max_hits, int) or max_hits < 0:
1884:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_policy.max_hits must be int >= 0")
1885:         if max_ratio is None or max_ratio < 0.0 or max_ratio > 1.0:
1886:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_policy.max_ratio must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1887: 
1888:     if not isinstance(backend_attribution, dict) or not backend_attribution:
1889:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution must be non-empty object")
1890:     else:
1891:         required_backends = backend_attribution.get("required_backends")
1892:         max_unattributed_regressions = backend_attribution.get("max_unattributed_regressions")
1893:         max_backend_specific_regressions = backend_attribution.get("max_backend_specific_regressions")
1894: 
1895:         if not isinstance(required_backends, list) or not required_backends:
1896:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution.required_backends must be non-empty array")
1897:         else:
1898:             required_backend_set = set()
1899:             for idx, backend_name in enumerate(required_backends):
1900:                 if not isinstance(backend_name, str) or not backend_name.strip():
1901:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution.required_backends[{idx}] must be non-empty string")
1902:                     continue
1903:                 required_backend_set.add(backend_name)
1904:             for must_have in ("linux_headless", "windows_headless"):
1905:                 if must_have not in required_backend_set:
1906:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution.required_backends must include '{must_have}'")
1907: 
1908:         if not isinstance(max_unattributed_regressions, int) or max_unattributed_regressions < 0:
1909:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution.max_unattributed_regressions must be int >= 0")
1910:         if not isinstance(max_backend_specific_regressions, int) or max_backend_specific_regressions < 0:
1911:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json backend_attribution.max_backend_specific_regressions must be int >= 0")
1912: 
1913:     if not isinstance(whitelist_convergence, dict) or not whitelist_convergence:
1914:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_convergence must be non-empty object")
1915:     else:
1916:         stale_run_threshold = whitelist_convergence.get("stale_run_threshold")
1917:         tighten_margin_ratio = _to_float(whitelist_convergence.get("tighten_margin_ratio"))
1918:         max_suggestions = whitelist_convergence.get("max_suggestions")
1919: 
1920:         if not isinstance(stale_run_threshold, int) or stale_run_threshold < 1:
1921:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_convergence.stale_run_threshold must be int >= 1")
1922:         if tighten_margin_ratio is None or tighten_margin_ratio < 0.0 or tighten_margin_ratio > 1.0:
1923:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_convergence.tighten_margin_ratio must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1924:         if not isinstance(max_suggestions, int) or max_suggestions < 0:
1925:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json whitelist_convergence.max_suggestions must be int >= 0")
1926: 
1927:     if not isinstance(exception_lifecycle, dict) or not exception_lifecycle:
1928:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json exception_lifecycle must be non-empty object")
1929:     else:
1930:         expire_idle_runs = exception_lifecycle.get("expire_idle_runs")
1931:         auto_reclaim_hit_streak = exception_lifecycle.get("auto_reclaim_hit_streak")
1932:         max_expired_entries = exception_lifecycle.get("max_expired_entries")
1933:         max_reclaim_candidates = exception_lifecycle.get("max_reclaim_candidates")
1934: 
1935:         if not isinstance(expire_idle_runs, int) or expire_idle_runs < 1:
1936:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json exception_lifecycle.expire_idle_runs must be int >= 1")
1937:         if not isinstance(auto_reclaim_hit_streak, int) or auto_reclaim_hit_streak < 1:
1938:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json exception_lifecycle.auto_reclaim_hit_streak must be int >= 1")
1939:         if not isinstance(max_expired_entries, int) or max_expired_entries < 0:
1940:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json exception_lifecycle.max_expired_entries must be int >= 0")
1941:         if not isinstance(max_reclaim_candidates, int) or max_reclaim_candidates < 0:
1942:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json exception_lifecycle.max_reclaim_candidates must be int >= 0")
1943: 
1944:     if not isinstance(strategy_orchestration, dict) or not strategy_orchestration:
1945:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration must be non-empty object")
1946:     else:
1947:         default_strategy = strategy_orchestration.get("default_strategy")
1948:         strategies = strategy_orchestration.get("strategies")
1949:         templates = strategy_orchestration.get("templates")
1950: 
1951:         if not isinstance(default_strategy, str) or not default_strategy.strip():
1952:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.default_strategy must be non-empty string")
1953: 
1954:         if not isinstance(strategies, dict) or not strategies:
1955:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.strategies must be non-empty object")
1956:             strategies = {}
1957:         if not isinstance(templates, dict) or not templates:
1958:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.templates must be non-empty object")
1959:             templates = {}
1960: 
1961:         if isinstance(default_strategy, str) and default_strategy and default_strategy not in strategies:
1962:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.default_strategy must reference strategies key")
1963: 
1964:         allowed_template_sections = {
1965:             "thresholds",
1966:             "whitelist_policy",
1967:             "backend_attribution",
1968:             "whitelist_convergence",
1969:             "exception_lifecycle",
1970:             "cross_version_baseline",
1971:             "report_layers",
1972:         }
1973: 
1974:         for strategy_name, strategy_row in strategies.items():
1975:             if not isinstance(strategy_name, str) or not strategy_name.strip():
1976:                 _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.strategies key must be non-empty string")
1977:                 continue
1978:             if not isinstance(strategy_row, dict) or not strategy_row:
1979:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.strategies.{strategy_name} must be non-empty object")
1980:                 continue
1981:             template_name = strategy_row.get("template")
1982:             if not isinstance(template_name, str) or not template_name.strip():
1983:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.strategies.{strategy_name}.template must be non-empty string")
1984:             elif template_name not in templates:
1985:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.strategies.{strategy_name}.template must reference templates key")
1986: 
1987:         for template_name, template_row in templates.items():
1988:             if not isinstance(template_name, str) or not template_name.strip():
1989:                 _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.templates key must be non-empty string")
1990:                 continue
1991:             if not isinstance(template_row, dict) or not template_row:
1992:                 _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.templates.{template_name} must be non-empty object")
1993:                 continue
1994:             for section_key, section_row in template_row.items():
1995:                 if section_key not in allowed_template_sections:
1996:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.templates.{template_name}.{section_key} is not a supported override section")
1997:                     continue
1998:                 if not isinstance(section_row, dict) or not section_row:
1999:                     _add_error(errors, f"visual_snapshot_targets.json strategy_orchestration.templates.{template_name}.{section_key} must be non-empty object")
2000: 
2001:     if not isinstance(release_gate_templates, dict) or not release_gate_templates:
2002:         _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json release_gate_templates must be non-empty object")
2003:     else:
2004:         required_strategies = release_gate_templates.get("required_strategies")
2005:         required_strategy_bindings = release_gate_templates.get("required_strategy_bindings")
2006:         ci_mode_bindings = release_gate_templates.get("ci_mode_bindings")
2007:         release_checklist = release_gate_templates.get("release_checklist")
2008: 
2009:         if not isinstance(required_strategies, list) or not required_strategies:
2010:             _add_error(errors, "visual_snapshot_targets.json release_gate_templates.required_strategies must be non-empty array")
2011:             required_strategies = []
2012:         else:

1321:     scoring_weights = stability_scoring.get("weights", {})

1323:     scoring_confidence = stability_scoring.get("confidence", {})

1325:     if not isinstance(scoring_weights, dict) or not scoring_weights:
1326:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.weights must be non-empty object")
1327:         return 1
1328:     weight_sum = 0.0
1329:     for key in ("matching_runs", "avg_warnings", "total_blockers", "tracking_failures"):
1330:         value = scoring_weights.get(key)
1331:         if not isinstance(value, (int, float)) or value < 0.0 or value > 1.0:
1332:             print(f"visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.weights.{key} must be within [0.0, 1.0]")
1333:             return 1
1334:         weight_sum += float(value)
1335:     if weight_sum <= 0.0:
1336:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.weights sum must be > 0")
1337:         return 1
1338: 
1339:     if not isinstance(scoring_caps, dict) or not scoring_caps:
1340:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.failure_caps must be non-empty object")

1344:     max_tracking_failures_cap = scoring_caps.get("max_tracking_failures")
1345:     if not isinstance(max_avg_warnings_cap, (int, float)) or max_avg_warnings_cap <= 0.0:
1346:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.failure_caps.max_avg_warnings must be float > 0.0")
1347:         return 1
1348:     if not isinstance(max_total_blockers_cap, int) or max_total_blockers_cap < 0:
1349:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.failure_caps.max_total_blockers must be int >= 0")
1350:         return 1
1351:     if not isinstance(max_tracking_failures_cap, int) or max_tracking_failures_cap < 0:
1352:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.failure_caps.max_tracking_failures must be int >= 0")
1353:         return 1
1354: 
1355:     if not isinstance(scoring_confidence, dict) or not scoring_confidence:
1356:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.confidence must be non-empty object")
1357:         return 1
1358:     reference_runs = scoring_confidence.get("reference_runs")
1359:     min_confidence = scoring_confidence.get("min_confidence")
1360:     if not isinstance(reference_runs, int) or reference_runs < 1:
1361:         print("visual_snapshot_targets.json stability_scoring.confidence.reference_runs must be int >= 1")
1362:         return 1
1363:     if not isinstance(min_confidence, (int, float)) or min_confidence < 0.0 or min_confidence > 1.0:

1391:         tier_max_tracking_failures = tier_row.get("max_tracking_failures")

732: 		assert_gte(float(row.get("luma_max", -1.0)), 0.0, "%s luma_max should be >= 0" % snapshot_id)
733: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("luma_max", -1.0)), 1.0, "%s luma_max should be <= 1" % snapshot_id)
734: 		assert_lte(float(row.get("luma_min", 0.0)), float(row.get("luma_max", 1.0)), "%s luma_min should not exceed luma_max" % snapshot_id)
735: 
736: 
737: func test_visual_snapshot_targets_reference_existing_scenes() -> void:
738: 	var cfg: Dictionary = _load_json_dict(VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_TARGETS_PATH)
739: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = cfg.get("snapshots", {})
740: 
741: 	for snapshot_id_var: Variant in snapshots.keys():
742: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_id_var)
743: 		var row: Dictionary = snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
744: 		var scene_path: String = str(row.get("scene", ""))
745: 		assert_true(ResourceLoader.exists(scene_path), "%s scene should exist" % snapshot_id)
746: 
747: 	var thresholds: Dictionary = cfg.get("thresholds", {})
748: 	assert_gte(int(thresholds.get("min_snapshots", 0)), 5, "D42 min_snapshots should be >= 5")
749: 	assert_eq(int(thresholds.get("max_failures", -1)), 0, "max_failures should stay strict at 0")
750: 	assert_eq(int(thresholds.get("max_trend_regressions", -1)), 0, "max_trend_regressions should stay strict at 0")
751: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_opaque_ratio_drop should be >= 0")
752: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_opaque_ratio_drop should be <= 1")
753: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)), 0.12, "D42 max_opaque_ratio_drop should be <= 0.12")
754: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be >= 0")
755: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be <= 1")
756: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)), 0.45, "D42 max_unique_color_drop_ratio should be <= 0.45")
757: 	assert_gte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", -1.0)), 0.0, "max_luma_delta should be >= 0")
758: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", -1.0)), 1.0, "max_luma_delta should be <= 1")
759: 	assert_lte(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)), 0.15, "D42 max_luma_delta should be <= 0.15")
